runtime.name: line then end
choice with greyed option, pick the eligible
interpolation: line + text beats expand {@ref}
set effects fire at snippet seams
game-event beat delivers its gameData
cross-scene jump resets scene-local props
sequence (repeat) wraps (a, b, a)
sequence (once) takes each child once then ends
voiced project: line stays static, text still interpolates
escaped braces unescape; {{@x}} stays literal
seeded shuffle selects a deterministic child
sequence (stick) holds the last child after the pass
sequential block plays its children in order
call jump tunnels out and returns to the next child
default run-group plays children in order, then gathers
visits() gates first-vs-return content across a loop
shared @scene prop: write, interpolate, persist across re-entry
temporary scene prop reseeds on re-entry; normal one persists
branch picks the first passing branch
shuffle draws without replacement and never repeats back-to-back
seen() flips after the node has been entered
jump is absolute: it discards a pending call-return
secretUntilEligible hides; default shows ineligible greyed
line carries the resolved character name (default locale -> authoring displayName)
active locale resolves strings + cast name; a missing key falls back to the default locale
IDs-only build emits beat IDs as text and omits the character name
beats carry accumulated author tags (scene/block/group/snippet/beat union)

scripted.name: flows share shared globals + shared scene props; per-flow state stays per-flow
engine reset re-seeds every kind of shared state
save/load mid-flow preserves the cursor, selector memory, and scene props
save/load at a pending choice replays the option set
live setLocale swaps the language mid-flow; the cursor + state are untouched
closed captions off strips dialogue-line cues (not narration); live toggle, no state change
choosing an Option group plays its content run and gathers back
once-only option is consumed; sticky options persist across re-entry
fallback option auto-follows when it is the only one left
hotSwap: a reworded line under the cursor plays the NEW text
hotSwap: a sibling inserted BEFORE the cursor neither replays nor shifts the resume point
hotSwap: a deleted ACTIVE snippet is skipped; play continues at the next survivor
hotSwap: a deleted option drops from the REPLAYED pending choice; survivors stay choosable
hotSwap: the cursor's whole container emptied - the frame drops and the flow ends cleanly

gameData.name: gameData: unset fields fall back to their declared defaults
gameData: override-only keys with no declared field are kept verbatim
gameData: a node with no overrides yields every default
